meta.title: The Boring Way to Learn AI (That Actually Works)
meta.description:
Most people don’t fail at AI because it’s hard.
They fail because they start too big.

Tiny projects build momentum.
Momentum builds confidence.
And confidence keeps you going.

If you want to level up in AI, start small on purpose.
